# cuboid_roi { #neuroim.cuboid_roi }

```python
cuboid_roi(bvol, centroid, surround, fill=None, nonzero=False)
```

Construct a cuboid (3D box) ROI from a brain volume.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name     | Type                                              | Description                                                                                      | Default    |
|----------|---------------------------------------------------|--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|------------|
| bvol     | [NeuroVol](`neuroim.neuro_vol.NeuroVol`)          | The brain volume to extract ROI from                                                             | _required_ |
| centroid | [array](`array`) - [like](`like`)                 | 3D coordinates (i,j,k) of the ROI center (0-based)                                               | _required_ |
| surround | [int](`int`) or [array](`array`) - [like](`like`) | Number of voxels around center. If int, same for all dims. If array, specify for each dimension. | _required_ |
| fill     | [float](`float`)                                  | Value to assign to ROI voxels. If None, use original values.                                     | `None`     |
| nonzero  | [bool](`bool`)                                    | If True, keep only nonzero voxels                                                                | `False`    |

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type                           | Description       |
|--------|--------------------------------|-------------------|
|        | [ROIVol](`neuroim.roi.ROIVol`) | Cuboid ROI object |
